text:
Krista Lenz is the alias used by Historia Reiss, a member of the Survey Corps in the Attack on Titan manga and anime. Other articles with this name include:
Historia (Chapter) - The 41st chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Historia (Episode) - The 30th episode of the Attack on Titan anime.
Krista Lenz (Chapter) - The 52nd chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
